line: Implemented the TUI metrics panel and wired it into the dashboard.
- Updated `src/main.rs` to load the new `tui` module

items: Updated `src/main.rs` to load the new `tui` module

line: - Updated `src/cmd/tui.rs` to render `MetricsPanel` and compute live CPU/I/O deltas in the TUI loop

items: Updated `src/cmd/tui.rs` to render `MetricsPanel` and compute live CPU/I/O deltas in the TUI loop

line: - Updated `crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs` to keep existing test-loop tests passing when state is built directly from recent tool history

items: Updated `crates/saw-core/src/classifier.rs` to keep existing test-loop tests passing when state is built directly from recent tool history

line: - `collect_snapshot()` only sampled one-shot process metrics, so real-time CPU/I/O panel requirements needed per-refresh delta sampling in the TUI loop.

items: `collect_snapshot()` only sampled one-shot process metrics, so real-time CPU/I/O panel requirements needed per-refresh delta sampling in the TUI loop.

line: - Existing classifier/watch tests relied on fallback test-loop detection from `recent_tool_calls`, so adding aggregate counters required preserving that path.

items: Existing classifier/watch tests relied on fallback test-loop detection from `recent_tool_calls`, so adding aggregate counters required preserving that path.

line: - Kept the new widget as a dedicated module at `src/tui/widgets/metrics_panel.rs` to match the plan’s intended structure.

items: Kept the new widget as a dedicated module at `src/tui/widgets/metrics_panel.rs` to match the plan’s intended structure.

line: - Used cumulative session counters in `AgentState` for tokens/tool calls/files touched so the panel can display stable session stats.

items: Used cumulative session counters in `AgentState` for tokens/tool calls/files touched so the panel can display stable session stats.

line: - Used an 8-cell CPU bar and human-readable byte formatting to match the acceptance criteria and plan mockup.

items: Used an 8-cell CPU bar and human-readable byte formatting to match the acceptance criteria and plan mockup.
